name: raycast-codex-reply
title: Codex Reply
description: Local Raycast extension that collects short replies for Codex prompts.
author: sebas

commands.name: reply-to-codex
commands.title: Reply to Codex
commands.subtitle: Answer pending prompt
commands.description: Open a minimal reply form for the current Codex prompt

commands.name: approve-codex-action
commands.title: Approve Codex Action
commands.subtitle: Send y or n
commands.description: Choose a single-letter approval response for a pending Codex permission prompt
